global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with prominent text and a call-to-action button.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to install the StarVault app for binge-watching.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'StarVault' in bold, modern typography, positioned prominently at the top.

elements.label: Binge starts now
elements.description: A large, bold headline reads 'Binge starts now' in white text, centrally located for emphasis.

elements.label: Cancel anytime
elements.description: A smaller text below the headline states 'Cancel anytime' in a lighter font, adding context to the offer.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Install now' in a contrasting color, inviting user action.

elements.label: Circular shapes
elements.description: Several circular shapes in varying sizes are scattered across the background, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A large rectangular shape is present, possibly serving as a placeholder or decorative element.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle shape located towards the bottom left, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Another small circle
elements.description: Another small circle shape positioned near the first, maintaining the design's playful aesthetic.

elements.label: Binge starts now text
elements.description: The text 'Binge starts now' is prominently displayed in a large, bold font, capturing attention.

elements.label: StarVault title
elements.description: The title 'StarVault' is presented in a bold, eye-catching font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Install now text
elements.description: The text 'Install now' is displayed in a button format at the bottom, encouraging immediate action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern and playful, StarVault logo, binge starts now message, install now button
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline and body text, with the CTA button at the bottom.
